agent_body_integration_map.description: ILMA Agent Body Integration Map - Phase 53C

runtime_router.purpose: Routes user intent → workflow → capabilities → tools/skills. Central nervous system connection point.
runtime_router.output: RoutingDecision (task_class, workflow, capabilities, tools, skills, confidence, safety_class)
runtime_router.when_used: Every task classification at start of session

planner.purpose: Plans task execution stages and mission breakdown
gaps: Planner not fully integrated with runtime_router output
No explicit planner class - distributed
planner.next_repair: Extract explicit Planner class from orchestrator

task_classifier.purpose: Classifies user intent into TaskClass enum (CODE, WRITE, RESEARCH, AUDIT, PLAN, INTERNAL, MULTI, ARTIFACT, SIMPLE, UNSAFE)

task_entrypoint.purpose: Primary integration point for Actor-Critic loop. All heavy missions should route through here.

session_manager.purpose: Manages auto-learning sessions with state machine: IDLE → ARMED → RUNNING → PAUSED → COMPLETED/STOPPED/BLOCKED/FAILED_SAFE

checkpoint_resume.purpose: Checkpoint system for long-running tasks to enable resume after interruption
gaps: CheckpointManager in fabric/ not fully integrated with session_manager
Resume logic needs verification
checkpoint_resume.next_repair: Integrate fabric/checkpoint_engine.py with session_manager checkpoint system

trace_exporter.purpose: Exports complete evolution trace for auditing and reproducibility
trace_exporter.input: trace_id, timestamp, target, task_class, iteration_count, judge_results, reflections

lesson_memory.purpose: Persistent lesson storage for autonomous evolution. JSONL backend with schema validation.
lesson_memory.when_used: After each successful evolution lesson learned
gaps: Vector DB adapter designed but NOT implemented (noted in docstring)

pretask_retrieval.purpose: Retrieves relevant past lessons BEFORE task execution to inform planning
pretask_retrieval.output: Dict with lessons, count, changed_plan, planning_hints
pretask_retrieval.when_used: Before every evolution task in task_entrypoint

mark_reused.purpose: Marks a lesson as reused for tracking and statistics
mark_reused.output: Updates reused_at timestamp and increments reuse_count in storage
mark_reused.when_used: After judge evaluation when lesson is applicable

evidence_ledger.purpose: Tracks evidence IDs for capability claims verification
evidence_ledger.output: List of evidence entries per capability
evidence_ledger.when_used: During capability verification and claim validation
gaps: Not a formal class, module-level functions
Evidence validation could be stricter
evidence_ledger.next_repair: Formalize as EvidenceLedger class with validation

tool_skill_selector.purpose: Selects right tools, skills, and scripts for given task. Safety enforcement: never hallucinate unavailable tools.
tool_skill_selector.output: Dict with tools, skills, scripts, execution_order, fallback, warnings, claim_boundary

parallel_executor.purpose: Executes multiple tasks in parallel for efficiency
gaps: Limited test coverage
Not integrated with tool_skill_selector
parallel_executor.next_repair: Add integration tests and connect to selector

code_writer.purpose: Generates code artifacts with quality enforcement
gaps: No dedicated code_writer class - distributed across components
code_writer.next_repair: Extract CodeWriter class with clear interface

gaps: Test runner health check mentioned but not fully validated
test_runner.next_repair: Add dedicated test health check endpoint

doc_generator.purpose: Generates documentation for artifacts and code
doc_generator.when_used: After artifact generation for documentation tasks
gaps: No formal doc_generator class
Ad-hoc implementation
doc_generator.next_repair: Create DocGenerator class with template system

search_tools.purpose: Free search capability for research tasks
gaps: Script ilma_free_search not fully verified in source scan
search_tools.next_repair: Verify ilma_free_search.py exists and is functional

critic_judge.purpose: Deterministic judge engine for Actor-Critic loop. Evaluates artifact against: compile, test, artifact existence, evidence IDs, security, truthfulness, task rubric.
critic_judge.output: JudgeResult (status: PASS/FAIL/WARN, score 0-100, failures, required_fixes, next_action)
critic_judge.when_used: After each actor output in evolution loop

reflexion_engine.purpose: Self-correction cycle: Judge finds error → ILMA revises → repeat. Implements Reflexion pattern.
reflexion_engine.when_used: When judge returns FAIL and revision needed
gaps: ReflexionEngine class not explicitly defined - pattern distributed
Limited test coverage
reflexion_engine.next_repair: Create explicit ReflexionEngine class wrapping the pattern

safety_contract.purpose: Enforces safety contract with forbidden scope and hard rules for auto-learning
safety_contract.when_used: At session creation, periodically during execution

claim_boundary.purpose: Defines what ILMA can and cannot claim based on evidence. Enforces truthfulness.

security_scanner.purpose: Static security analysis for code artifacts
gaps: Located in test_projects, not production scripts/
Limited pattern coverage

mutation_tests.purpose: Mutation testing to verify test quality
gaps: Mutation tests are spot checks, not comprehensive
Limited automation
mutation_tests.next_repair: Add automated mutation test runner in CI

capability_registry.purpose: Central registry of all 78 ILMA capabilities with status, cost, evidence

capability_to_script_map.purpose: Maps 78 capabilities to their implementation scripts
gaps: 12 MISSING_SCRIPT entries - capabilities without implementation
capability_to_script_map.next_repair: Implement missing scripts for: debugging, writing_blog, writing_novel, file_operations, networking, runtime_benchmarking, documentation, contradiction_detection, context_refs, checkpoints_rollback, working_buffer, phase17_350file_execution

services_manifest.purpose: Documents service decomposition status (moved/deferred per domain)
gaps: 7 services deferred - core services high risk to change
Evidence and backup moved, 7 deferred

workflow_standard.purpose: Standard workflow definitions for agentic operations
gaps: Workflow standard exists but not fully enforced
workflow_standard.next_repair: Add workflow validation against standard in runtime_router

final_report_generator.purpose: Generates final evolution session report with trace summary

claim_boundary_enforcement.purpose: Enforces claim boundary rules - prevents false capability claims
claim_boundary_enforcement.when_used: Before any claim in user-facing output

user_facing_explanation.purpose: Human-readable explanation of routing decisions and system behavior
user_facing_explanation.output: Human-readable string with task_class, workflow, confidence, safety, max_iterations, judge_rubric
user_facing_explanation.when_used: Debug mode, user asking 'why did you choose this?'
gaps: explain_routing is basic, could be more detailed
user_facing_explanation.next_repair: Enhance explanation with capability details and alternative options

integration_flow.description: Typical flow for heavy evolution task
steps: 2. runtime_router.route() → RoutingDecision with workflow, capabilities, tools
8. If FAIL: reflexion_engine revises → loop back to step 6
9. If PASS: mark_reused() for applicable lessons
